report.name: Office Space Organization - Initial PDCA Attempt

categories.name: Plan

attachments.name: cluttered_office_current_state.jpg
attachments.description: Current cluttered office state with disorganized storage and workspace inefficiencies

categories.description: Basic planning attempt to address office organization issues with limited systematic approach and unclear goal setting.

statements.name: General problem identified: office is disorganized and messy
Limited analysis of root causes or contributing factors
Vague goal: make office more organized and efficient
Basic action plan with limited detail and no timeline
No specific success metrics or measurement methods defined

categories.name: Do

attachments.name: organization_attempt.jpg
attachments.description: Initial organization attempts with basic sorting and some labeling efforts

categories.description: Limited implementation efforts with basic organization activities but lack of systematic approach and follow-through.

statements.name: Some filing cabinets organized but inconsistently
Basic labeling attempted but many areas still unlabeled
Common area tidied up temporarily
Storage closet partially sorted but not completed
No systematic workflow changes implemented

categories.name: Check
categories.description: Informal evaluation showing minimal lasting improvement with many areas reverting to previous disorganized state.

statements.name: Minimal lasting improvement observed in most areas
Some areas already reverting to previous disorganized state
Staff feedback mixed with limited adoption of changes
No formal measurement or documentation of results
Unclear whether goals were achieved due to vague objectives

categories.name: Act
categories.description: Limited action phase with uncertainty about next steps and minimal learning from initial attempt.

statements.name: Limited understanding of what worked and what didn't
No systematic documentation of lessons learned
Uncertain about whether to continue or try different approach
Some frustration with lack of progress and sustainability
Next steps unclear without better planning framework

highlightsData.title: Plan
highlightsData.description:
Basic Problem Recognition: General awareness that office is disorganized and messy, affecting daily operations, but limited systematic analysis of specific issues or contributing factors.

Planning Limitations: Vague goal setting without specific, measurable objectives or timeline, and basic action plan lacking detail and systematic approach to sustainable improvement.

highlightsData.title: Do
highlightsData.description:
Limited Implementation: Basic organization activities including partial filing cabinet organization and some labeling efforts, but lacking systematic approach and comprehensive coverage of problem areas.

Execution Challenges: Inconsistent implementation with some areas receiving attention while others remain unchanged, and no systematic workflow improvements to support sustainable organization.

highlightsData.title: Check
highlightsData.description:
Minimal Progress: Informal evaluation showing limited lasting improvement with many areas already reverting to previous disorganized state due to lack of systematic sustainment approach.

Measurement Gaps: No formal measurement or documentation of results, making it difficult to determine actual progress or identify specific areas needing attention for future improvement efforts.

highlightsData.title: Act
highlightsData.description:
Learning Challenges: Limited understanding of what worked and what didn't work, with no systematic documentation of lessons learned or analysis of implementation barriers and success factors.

Next Steps Uncertainty: Unclear direction for future improvement efforts due to lack of systematic evaluation and planning framework, resulting in frustration and uncertainty about continuation approach.

actionItems.title: Learn PDCA Methodology Basics
actionItems.description: Attend training or research PDCA methodology to understand systematic approach to problem-solving and improvement

attachments.name: pdca_training_resources.jpg
attachments.description: Collection of PDCA training materials and methodology resources

actionItems.title: Define Specific Measurable Goals
actionItems.description: Develop specific, measurable goals for office organization improvement with clear success criteria

actionItems.title: Conduct Proper Root Cause Analysis
actionItems.description: Perform systematic root cause analysis to understand why office becomes disorganized and identify specific contributing factors

attachments.name: root_cause_analysis_tools.jpg
attachments.description: Root cause analysis tools and methods for office organization problems
